human_decision_detail: User confirmed that all 14 STALE EQUITY funds identified in the previous dry-run are gold / mining / precious-metals funds. Per regulatory and product suitability policy, these funds must NOT be made available for conservative profiles 3 and 4. The stored compatible_profiles ([5,6,7,8,9,10]) are CORRECT from a product perspective, even though the backend suitability engine computed [3,4,5,6,7,8,9,10] due to a classification gap: these funds have asset_subtype=THEMATIC_EQUITY with economic_exposure.equity=0.0, causing all equity-cap rules to pass. The engine lacks a specific rule for precious-metals/commodities-thematic equity exclusion from p3-p4.

root_cause_analysis.engine_behavior: With real_eq=0%, all equity-cap rules (>30%, >45%, >60%) are not triggered. is_sector_fund=false in Firestore (or engine does not detect THEMATIC_EQUITY as sector). No rule explicitly blocks gold/mining/precious-metals for p<=4.
root_cause_analysis.missing_rule: The suitability engine has no explicit rule for THEMATIC_EQUITY subtype with commodities/precious-metals exposure. Backend engine gap — not a data error.
root_cause_analysis.implication: The computed [3,4,5,6,7,8,9,10] is technically correct per the current engine rules but incorrect per product policy. The stored [5,6,7,8,9,10] reflects the intended product behavior.
root_cause_analysis.future_fix: BDB-SUITABILITY-THEMATIC-EQUITY-COMMODITIES-RULE-0: add explicit rule or classification for gold/mining/precious-metals thematic equity funds to block p3-p4.

discrepancy_resolved.resolution: Document BDB_COMPATIBLE_PROFILES_REGEN_DRYRUN_0.md incorrectly stated '13 fondos' in narrative text. The artifact JSON and the table in the same document correctly listed 14 ISINs. Artifact is source of truth: 14 funds confirmed.
